summary: Added --review flag to /pr command via STEP 0 early-exit block in .claude/extensions/cslib/commands/pr.md. Parses GitHub PR URLs, Zulip thread URLs, and free-text descriptions into a typed sources array; creates a state.json task with task_type 'pr' and sources field. All 3 phases complete.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering what changed, decisions made, and one plan deviation (no tmp-dir needed)
STEP 0 block (~295 lines) added before STEP 1 with --review detection, source parsing, and task creation
